message:
feat(vdbe,btree,core,wal): add SetSnapshot opcode for temporal queries, harden region lifecycle, and fix overflow in learned index

VDBE / codegen:
- Add SetSnapshot opcode (191) for SQL:2011 temporal queries with
  TimeTravelCommitSeq and TimeTravelTimestamp P4 variants
- Add emit_set_snapshot helper that emits SetSnapshot after OpenRead
  when a time-travel clause is present
- Update codegen_select to destructure time_travel from table source
- Merge UnaryOp and IsNull arms in collect_having_aggregates
- Add `changes: usize` field to VdbeEngine for tracking rows modified
- Bump Noop to 192 and opcode COUNT to 193

B-tree:
- Fix arithmetic overflow in LearnedIndex::lookup by using
  saturating_add instead of plain addition
- Add test for u64::MAX key lookup

Core:
- Pass self.schemas.clone() directly instead of self.get_vdbe_schema()
  in PreparedStatement::step and SELECT codegen, providing the full
  schema instead of a filtered view
- Add state validation in region complete_close() — returns Ok if
  already Closed, requires Closing state, errors for Open/other states
- Add test_complete_close_requires_closing_state

WAL:
- Improvements to WAL layer (27 insertions, 7 deletions)
- Minor checkpoint executor adjustment

Misc:
- Upgrade debug_assert to assert for unpin-at-zero detection in
  arc_cache (catches in release builds too)
- Change .unwrap() to .expect("8 bytes") in sketch_telemetry for clarity
- Simplify top-level fsqlite/lib.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
